emails.subject: RE: Sale of Napoleonville, LA property,  Our file ENR-02
emails.subject_base: Sale of Napoleonville, LA property,  Our file ENR-02
emails.body: RE: Sale of Napoleonville, LA property, Our file ENR-02 Gerald, Sorry for not getting back to you sooner on this. I have sent an email to David Owen about the hazardous waste question. I will let you know what he says. However, correct me if I'm wrong, but I don't think we want to make any warranties about potential hazardous waste sources on the property. At the most, we could make a warranty about the fact, if true, that we have never used the property in such a manner. David Owen should be able to tell us a little more about the uses of the property. As far as Item #3 below is concerned, do you know if we have done a title search on the property? If we need to do a title search, there is a guy in Louisiana that can do it for us. If we know there is a discrepancy in the chain of title, is there a way to nullify the latest transfer between LRPC to LRCI. Let me know what you think. If you think it is necessary to meet to discuss these points, please let me know. Thanks, Rakhi (x3-7871) To: Israni, Rakhi

emails.subject: RE: Sale of Napoleonville, LA property,  Our file ENR-02
emails.subject_base: Sale of Napoleonville, LA property,  Our file ENR-02
emails.body: Gerald, Did you hear anything from Keith Daigle regarding the title search? In his last email, he indicated that it would be completed last Wednesday. Has Kyle Purvis gotten back to you regarding the hazardous waste sources issue? Hopefully, we can finalize these documents soon. The guys from Assumption Parish are very anxious to get this deal closed quickly. FYI...regarding the Sorrento ROWs with Enterprise Products, the money should be transferred this morning and the documents fully executed by this afternoon. Talk to you soon, Rakhi

emails.subject: RE: Sale of Napoleonville, LA property,  Our file ENR-02

emails.body: RE: Sale of Napoleonville, LA property, Our file ENR-02 Gerald, Do you know the status of the Assumption Parish documents? Are we ready for Enron to execute? Rakhi x3-7871

emails.body: Keith is forwarding hard copies of the documents. As soon as I recieve them, I will review, initial, and forward to you for execution.
